meta.notes: Example trajectory trace for the packaged tip-flow scenario.

scenarios.notes: Example scoring trace for a selective tip workflow.

correctOrder.evidence: Feed review completed before balance check and tip execution.

amountValidation.evidence: Tip amount was clamped to 4 DEM and kept within the allowed 1-10 range.

selectionQuality.evidence: Chosen post exceeded the quality threshold and included attestation context.

errorHandling.evidence: Workflow captured the transfer result and would stop on insufficient balance.

assertions.evidence: Selection logic inspected payload.text and payload.cat fields from feed rows.

assertions.text: Checks score field for quality ranking
assertions.evidence: Feed rows were sorted using the score field before selection.
Only posts at or above the configured quality threshold were considered.
Priority increased for posts with linked attestations.
Trace recorded a balance lookup before spend.
Available DEM exceeded the planned 4 DEM tip.
Remaining budget stayed positive after the 4 DEM transfer.
